description: Regression fixtures for Geo Command save/load compatibility.

valid.name: baseline_session_v1
valid.intent: Balanced mid-session with stable diplomacy/trade/events and normal scheduler data.

valid.name: high_tension_session_v1
valid.intent: Escalation scenario including one legacy task type to verify runtime task skipping behavior.

valid.name: economic_shock_session_v1
valid.intent: Economic stress scenario with domestic + migration pressure and sandbox mode metadata.

invalid.name: missing_meta_session_v1
invalid.intent: Missing required meta block should fail during migration.

invalid.name: unsupported_version_session_v99
invalid.intent: Future version fixture should be rejected as unsupported.

invalid.name: malformed_task_queue_session_v1
invalid.intent: Pending task queue wrong type should fail validation.
